title: DEKTON 9/L Insulated Winter Working Latex Coated Gloves | Ultimate Protection for Cold Environments | Ideal for Winter, Cold Storage & Protection | Latex Coated | CE Cat 2, EN388 & EN511 Certified
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack

Ultimate Protection for Cold Environments: Designed specifically for winter and cold storage use, these gloves offer exceptional insulation and protection against low temperatures. The latex coating provides a robust barrier against cold and harsh conditions, making them ideal for outdoor work and cold environments.

Ultra Grip Material for Enhanced Safety: The gloves feature an ultra-grip material that ensures a secure hold on tools and materials, even in slippery or wet conditions. This enhanced grip reduces the risk of accidents and improves overall safety, providing confidence and control during use.

Latex Coated for Durability and Warmth: The latex coating not only enhances durability but also provides warmth and protection against the elements. This coating helps to keep your hands warm and dry while maintaining flexibility and comfort, ensuring reliable performance in cold conditions.

CE Cat 2, EN388 & EN511 Certified: These gloves meet CE Category 2, EN388, and EN511 standards, confirming their effectiveness in protecting against mechanical risks and cold temperatures. The certifications ensure that the gloves offer high levels of abrasion, cut, tear, and puncture resistance, as well as cold protection.

Ideal for Various Applications: Perfect for winter work, cold storage, and any situation requiring extra protection, these gloves are versatile and reliable. Whether you’re working outdoors in freezing temperatures or handling materials in cold environments, the Dekton gloves provide the performance and protection you need.
